summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IDEAL Lab Inventory Management System with focus on specific features: custom asset IDs (XYZ/ABCD/EF format), real users data, image upload for service requests, and user functionality. All requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Dashboard shows exactly 6 users and 40 assets
Assets page displays custom asset IDs in XYZ/ABCD/EF format (FRN/A8FR/9E, CMP/VPJW/JJ, etc.)
Users page displays all 5 real users: Richik Majumder, Pankaj Kumar Barman, Sunil Patel, Anshu Pal, Test User
My Assets page shows user's 13 assigned assets with custom IDs
Profile page loads with password change functionality
Profile page has profile photo upload feature
Service Requests page has image upload field (max 4 images)
Service request creation dialog with proper image upload controls
Image upload accepts image/* files with multiple selection
User dashboard shows correct asset count (13 assets)
Custom asset ID format validation (all 40 assets have proper XYZ/ABCD/EF format)
Real users data integration (all expected users present in system)
Shared assets functionality (Lab Printer, Lab Locker, Lab Whiteboard, etc.)
Asset assignment to specific users working correctly
Navigation between all pages working smoothly
success_percentage: Backend: 93% (13/14 tests passed - 1 minor create user failure due to existing email), Frontend: 100% (18/18 tests passed)
